arc_function: Establish the protagonist's signature strategic doctrine: apparent cowardice masks calculated double reversal; demonstrate how perceived predictability becomes tactical weapon; introduce alliance dynamics through simultaneous multi-front coordination
dominant_engine: Strategic reputation weapon—being known as predictable enables actual unpredictability through staged defeat
state_progression: Alliance under siege pressure with depleted forces
Advisor council debate between cautious and aggressive philosophies
Protagonist proposes seemingly foolish staged surrender
Antagonist accepts staged defeat, overconfidence activated
Alliance partner exploits distraction to open second front
Protagonist's double reversal revealed: apparent defeat was victory disguised as surrender

turning_points.function: Strategic pivot: protagonist's cowardice proposal is actually multi-layered trap mechanism; antagonist's acceptance marks commitment to false victory path

setup_payoff_rhythm: Early chapter establishes staged defeat premise with advisor objections; mid-chapter antagonist accepts apparent victory; late chapter payoff through double reversal revelation and second front activation
reusable_mechanisms: Staged defeat with pre-positioned escape route to buy time for allies
Double reversal: apparent victory is actually defeat disguised as victory
Strategic reputation weapon: being known as predictable makes enemy ignore actual unpredictability
Advisor council with competing tactical philosophies (aggressive vs cautious)
Force exhaustion from prolonged siege creating vulnerability
Alliance partner exploiting distraction to open second front
Authorial aside as in-world lesson mechanism
failure_modes: Antagonist intelligence fluctuation: too aware of tactics in one scene, too arrogant in next
Staged defeat mechanism relies on reader trusting the revelation before it's confirmed
Historical knowledge assumed without exposition for unfamiliar readers
Anachronistic humor may clash with historical setting tone
Crisis interruption pattern can feel artificially manufactured if information timing seems contrived

craft_profile.pov_distance: Third-person limited with multi-viewpoint rotation; strategic omniscience on protagonist's true plans; comic distance on protagonist's performative cowardice
craft_profile.sentence_rhythm: Rapid-fire dialogue exchanges during council scenes; longer expository passages for strategic reasoning; staccato action beats during combat
craft_profile.paragraphing: Short punchy paragraphs for tension; extended blocks for tactical explanation; single-line action beats for combat rhythm
craft_profile.dialogue_method: Distinct voice registers: cautious advisor's measured caution, aggressive advisor's impatient urgency, antagonist's commanding authority, protagonist's anachronistic casual slang
craft_profile.description_method: Sparse battlefield description; focus on character reactions and emotional states; historical/geographical markers as flavor text
craft_profile.exposition_method: Strategy explained through advisor debate; tactical reasoning revealed in retrospect; historical parallels as analytical frame for in-world lessons
craft_profile.hook_delivery: Crisis interruption pattern: decision nearly reached, new information forces pivot to new tactical consideration
craft_profile.transition_method: Scene break with chapter title as temporal marker; strategic consequence chains connecting setpieces
